name: react-web-component-bridge-monorepo
description: Production-oriented TypeScript monorepo for exposing React components as browser-native Web Components.

scripts.typecheck: pnpm exec tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/generator/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/test-components/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @fahimc/react-web-component-bridge build && pnpm --filter @fahimc/react-web-component-bridge-generator build && pnpm --filter @fahimc/react-web-component-bridge-test-components build
scripts.build:examples: pnpm --filter plain-html-consumer build && pnpm --filter react-consumer build && pnpm --filter vue-consumer build && pnpm --filter complex-components-example build && pnpm --filter angular-consumer build
scripts.validate: pnpm format && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm build:examples && pnpm build:site && pnpm test:types
